arts.ttl: Thursday's Transfer Talk Update: Guglielmo Vicario, Fraser Forster, Rasmus Hojlund
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim names one of Manchester United's 'greatest weapons' in first programme notes
arts.sum: New Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has penned his first programme notes ahead of the visit of Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals stance on selling £53m Chelsea star to Man Utd amid transfer links
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is struggling to keep all of the players in his bloated squad happy, with Manchester United one of the rivals circling over stars demanding more game time

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told to swoop for same ex-Man United star Erik ten Hag 'wanted' before axe
arts.sum: Lee Sharpe believes Rasmus Hojlund is in need of support in the final third at Manchester United, and thinks that Ruben Amorim should turn to a familiar face in the January window

arts.ttl: Manchester United predicted line-up vs Bodo/Glimt as Lisandro Martinez and Rasmus Hojlund start
arts.sum: Man United will be hoping to secure their first win of the Ruben Amorim era when they host Bodo/Glimt in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Manchester United's likely starting lineup for Ruben Amorim's 'special' home debut
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim drew his first game as Manchester United manager at Ipswich Town on Sunday, now he looks for his first win in the Europa League, on his home debut at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim advised to re-sign same ex-Man Utd star that Erik ten Hag wanted before sack
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star Lee Sharpe has explained that Ruben Amorim should work tirelessly to sign a former Red Devils star who Erik ten Hag was headhunting before his sacking at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim and Erik ten Hag are saying similar things about Man United player who should be unsellable
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is the player in the Manchester United squad with the most goalscoring ability but he is being challenged by managers to show how much he wants it.

arts.ttl: I idolised David Beckham and Man United - now I want to ruin Ruben Amorim's Old Trafford debut
arts.sum: United's Europa League clash with Bodo/Glimt will mean more than most to one opposition player

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has a Manchester United problem Erik ten Hag rarely had to face
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim could find it challenging to select his starting XI for Thursday night's Europa League clash with Bodo/Glimt.
